summary: Adjusted the opening so chapter 7 carries chapter 6's shipboard residue directly into Faye's departure; the exit already handed off cleanly into the next chapter's night register and was left intact.
edits: Reframed the opening around the Bebop hangar's lingering engine-grease-and-bell-pepper smell to strengthen the entry seam.
Condensed the follow-on opening beat so Miriam's afterimage lands faster once Faye is already moving.
Verified the chapter does not contain any verbatim style-bible calibration example lines.
